Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given an event log with three cases Lets analyze the traces Case 1 RA VF AE RMI VF AD SC AC Case 2 RA VF AE AD SC AC Case 3 RA VF AE RMI RMI VF AD SC AC Observations All cases start with RA then VF then AE After AE there is an optional part sometimes case 1 and 3 we have one or more RMI followed by VF sometimes case 2 we go directly to AD

Name: Inductive Reasoning - IND
Text: The optional part after AE seems to be a loop that can be executed zero or more times Each iteration of the loop consists of RMI VF

Name: Validation - NE
Text: in case 3 we have two RMI in a row That is not two iterations of RMI VF because we have RMI RMI VF So the pattern is not simply RMI VF repeated

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: VF after AE is only executed if there is at least one RMI the pattern is after AE optional repetition of RMI zero or more times and if non empty then VF

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: model as XOR between tau skip and SEQUENCE one or more RMI VF one or more RMI modeled as LOOP RMI tau

Name: Validation - PE
Text: check traces Case 2 zero RMI tau then AD good Case 1 one RMI loop RMI then VF good Case 3 two RMI loop RMI tau RMI then VF good

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: construct entire process tree SEQUENCE RA VF AE Optional AD SC AC with Optional as X tau SEQUENCE LOOP RMI tau VF nested binary sequences
